rationale: Two load-bearing edges were missing. The hypothesis 'x does not occur free in phi' is an occurrence-level freeness condition -> def:bound-free (Bound and Free Occurrences). The conclusion asserts logical equivalence (==) -> def:log-equiv (same ==-theorem convention as 0037/0040/0041). The licensing span below is for def:bound-free; '\equiv' in the statement licenses def:log-equiv.
notes: def:quantifier-scope (the current sole dep) is kept but is plausibly transitive: def:bound-free is itself defined via scope, so freeness is the direct concept and scope sits one layer below. Reviewer may drop def:quantifier-scope once def:bound-free is in. Removal not enacted on uncertain grounds.
